pageContext.name: Brightmare "Jahbreaker" SuperJanky
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Superplastic are excited to present the new Brightmare 'Jahbreaker' SuperJanky Designer Collectible Toy!  NEVER SLEEP AGAIN!  Alex Pardee is back with his final colorway and your inner child is going to need some serious therapy when they wake up.  Brightmare 'Jahbreaker' is most infamously known as the imaginary friend to the stars of horror - Jason Voorhees, Freddy Kreuger, and Michael Myers to name a few. Pennywise the Clown even has Brightmare 'Jahbreaker' listed as his emergency contact!  With custom jaws and claws this 8 play-place massacre will be having you missing your old night terrors. Don't miss your chance to add him to your horror collection!
